What our guests are saying
★
★
★
★
★
Good kitchen + Market is a great choice for a nice Sunday breakfast, the atmosphere if very homey. We ordered the carnivore and avocado bowls, as well as an order of pancakes. We love finding food that is on the healthier side but still delicious. The pancakes were amazingly light and flavorful. Can't wait to stop by again.
View more
Demoins S.
★
★
★
★
★
Good kitchen + market is one of our very favorite restaurants in Georgia! They cook with high quality ingredients + healthy oils/butter, and are so kind about food allergies/sensitivities. I can't have gluten, dairy, or eggs and they always accomodate me so well and make sure I am taken care of! Every employee is so kind and the food isn't just good for you - it's also delicious! The coffee is amazing too! Dietary restrictions: One of the most accommodating restaurants to dietary restrictions I have ever been to!
View more
Hannah S.
★
★
★
★
★
Our first time here and it was fantastic. A fresh and healthy approach to breakfast, with plenty of options for meat lovers and vegetarians. I loved the gluten free pancakes and grits. My wife had a breakfast bowl and our son loaded up on bacon…it’s all good! Great service with a warm ambiance inside and ample seating outside on the spacious porch. Parking can be tight on weekends but the dirt lot across the street is convenient.
View more
Chris S.

--- Page: /page/specialty-coffee-drinks ---
Specialty Coffee Drinks | Good Kitchen
Please place your catering orders at least 48 hours in advance! Click here to order.
Craft Coffee & Matcha Drinks
Just like our food, the coffee we serve is top quality - East Pole Coffee - based in Atlanta. And just like our food all of our coffee drinks are made with house-made syrups using only clean ingredients. From Rosemary Vanilla Lattes to Salted Maple Cappuccinos to Honey Lavender Matcha Lattes - our drinks are sugar-free, flavorful and delicious. We also offer seasonal specials that showcase the flavors of each season. In a sea of commercial, drive-thru coffee shops, we offer a quality alternative
Your Daily Destination for Exceptional Coffee
At Good Kitchen & Market, your neighborhood coffee shop in Smyrna and Marietta, great coffee begins with passion, quality beans, and expertly crafted drinks. From a morning specialty coffee to an afternoon iced coffee with friends, our rich coffee offerings keep you coming back for more.
Image gallery
Close
Close
Sip the Experience, Our Coffee Experience
From bold espresso shots to smooth drip coffee, Good Kitchen & Market serves a variety of coffee drinks made with care. Our coffee is thoughtfully sourced and freshly brewed throughout the day so you always get a great‑tasting cup — perfect for busy mornings, casual coffee shop meetups, or a cozy midday break.
Specialty Coffee & Drinks, Crafted With Care
Every cup tells a story:
● Espresso — a concentrated symphony of flavor
● Cappuccino & Latte — velvet clouds kissed with espresso
● Cold Brew & Iced Coffee — crisp, refreshing, and endlessly drinkable
● Seasonal Coffee Creations — fleeting delights that capture the essence of the season
Why Our Coffee Stands Out
As a neighborhood coffee destination, Good Kitchen & Market focuses on:
● High‑quality beans and expertly brewed coffee
● Friendly service in a welcoming coffee shop environment
● A great pairing with our bakery items, breakfast plates, and brunch menu
Visit Us For Coffee
Whether you're in Smyrna near 2750 Atlanta Rd. SW or in Marietta at 116 Margaret Ave. NE, stop by Good Kitchen & Market for your favorite coffee drink. Our coffee bar is ready to serve specialty coffee, traditional drip coffee, espresso, lattes, cold brew, and more — all brewed fresh just for you.
